name: Dev CI Frontend Unit Delete State Hotfix
summary: Corrected a timing-sensitive frontend unit assertion after the post-merge dev CI run failed.
behaviorBugsFound: No production behavior bug was found.
The test asserted the restored delete button state before the rejected async delete handler had finished clearing its pending state.
finalRecommendation: Open a hotfix PR into dev, wait for green CI Dev and staging image publication, then promote toward main.
